steps.title: Punctuate the place list
steps.content: The sentence lists three places where azulejos beautify public spaces: libraries, train stations, and public squares. The blank must separate the first list item from the second without creating a break or interruption.

steps.title: Reject nonlist punctuation
steps.content: A uses a colon, which is not needed inside this simple series. B runs the list items together with no punctuation. C uses a dash, which incorrectly marks an interruption rather than a standard list separator. A comma fits the list. The answer is D.
